hero.sub: Built for those who push beyond the treeline — where conditions change and only the right gear keeps you moving.

manifesto.label: Performance Architecture · AW25
manifesto.desc: Every Veilpeak piece endures 18 months of prototype testing across three continents before a single unit ships.
manifesto.thermalDesc: Down clusters treated with fluorocarbon-free DWR. No cold soak under sustained wet exposure. No compression loss.
manifesto.articulatedDesc: Pre-bent elbows, gusseted underarms, and hip-rise waistband follow your natural range of motion.
manifesto.pillar0Body: 3-layer Gore-Tex Pro. Fully taped seams. A DWR finish rated for sustained mountain downpours — not morning drizzle.
manifesto.pillar1Body: AlpineFill™ down maintains 90% loft at −40°C. Moisture-resistant coating prevents cold-soak even in wet alpine conditions.
manifesto.pillar2Body: Articulated patterning follows scapular rotation and hip flexion. Pre-bent elbows and gusseted underarms mean zero fabric pull.

fullset.label: The full kit
fullset.desc: The Summit Shell Jacket and Alpine Hardshell Trousers are built as a system — layered defence against summit conditions, cut for movement, not just coverage.
fullset.feature2: Articulated cut for full range of motion

testimonials.label: Field Reports · Verified Owners
testimonials.desc: Every review is from a verified Veilpeak owner — no incentivised posts, no curated selection.
testimonials.quote0: Three seasons on the Haute Route. The Summit Shell didn't flinch once — not in Chamonix wind, not in Zermatt sleet. I've worn a lot of shells. This one ended the search.
testimonials.quote1: The AlpineFill kept me at −38°C in the Cairngorms. I expected to suffer. I didn't. After 12 years guiding I've never trusted a piece of kit this completely.
testimonials.quote2: Fifteen years of climbing, every premium brand tried. Veilpeak sits above them. The construction quality is in a different league — and the 12-year warranty proves they know it.

product.defaultDesc: Built for the most demanding alpine conditions. Technical fabric, ergonomic construction, and uncompromising durability — engineered to perform where others fail.
product.freeShipping: Free shipping on orders over €200 · 12-year warranty

products.label: Veilpeak AW25
products.headline: The collection
products.desc: Technical gear engineered for alpine environments.

cart.label: Veilpeak
cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptySub: Add some gear to get started.

about.headline: About Veilpeak
about.p1: Veilpeak was founded by alpinists who grew tired of gear that looked the part but failed where it mattered — above the snowline, in the dark, when conditions shifted without warning. We build every piece to perform at Grade-I alpine standard or not at all.
about.p2: Every product endures 18 months of prototype testing across three continents before a single unit ships. Our 12-year warranty isn't a marketing claim — it's our commitment to the craft of what we make.
about.p3: Headquartered in Innsbruck, Austria, with test teams across Chamonix, the Cairngorms, and the Karakoram. We are a small team, and we intend to stay that way.

expeditions.headline: Expeditions
expeditions.p1: Coming soon — we're documenting our next alpine season.
expeditions.p2: Expedition reports, route documentation, and gear testing journals from our field teams across the Alps, Cairngorms, and Karakoram. Check back in Spring 2026 for the first dispatches.

stories.headline: Stories
stories.p1: Field notes, expedition reports, and gear reviews. Coming soon.
stories.p2: Long-form writing from alpinists, guides, and the Veilpeak team. Honest assessments of what works and what doesn't — written at altitude, not in a marketing office. First stories publish Spring 2026.

contact.headline: Contact
contact.successBody: We'll get back to you within 2 business days.

privacy.headline: Privacy Policy
privacy.section0Body: We collect information you provide directly to us when you place an order, create an account, or contact us. This includes your name, email address, postal address, and payment information. We also collect usage data automatically, such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited.
privacy.section1Body: We use the information we collect to process orders, send order confirmations and tracking updates, respond to your enquiries, improve our products and services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes.
privacy.section2Body: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfil our legal obligations. Order data is retained for seven years in accordance with applicable tax and commercial law requirements. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.section3Body: Our website uses essential cookies to enable core functionality such as the shopping cart and language preference. We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though this may affect site functionality.
privacy.section4Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may also request that we restrict processing or port your data to another service. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@veilpeak.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section5Body: For any privacy-related enquiries, please contact our Data Protection Officer at contact@veilpeak.com. Our registered address is Veilpeak GmbH, Innsbruck, Austria.

terms.headline: Terms of Service
terms.section0Body: By accessing or purchasing from veilpeak.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.section1Body: All prices are shown in Euros (€) and include applicable VAT where required. We reserve the right to change prices at any time without notice. Product descriptions are provided in good faith. In the event of a significant discrepancy between the described and actual product, you are entitled to a full refund.
terms.section2Body: By placing an order, you make an offer to purchase the selected products. We reserve the right to decline any order. Payment is processed securely at checkout. We do not store your full payment card details. An order confirmation email will be sent once your order is accepted.
terms.section3Body: We ship to most European countries. Standard delivery takes 3–5 business days; express options are available at checkout. Shipping is free on orders over €200. Veilpeak is not responsible for delays caused by customs clearance or events outside our reasonable control.
terms.section4Body: Unused products may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Our 12-year warranty covers manufacturing defects under normal use. Damage caused by misuse, accident, or normal wear and tear is not covered. To initiate a return or warranty claim, contact contact@veilpeak.com.
terms.section5Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Veilpeak shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our products or services. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid for the product in question.
terms.section6Body: These terms are governed by Austrian law. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Innsbruck, Austria, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your country of residence provide otherwise.
